name: perform-readable-floor
note: Wrap-first sizing model (operator-approved 2026-07-24): the Perform font is a READABLE size the user controls - it never auto-shrinks to fit. This is the goalpost that retires the old 'fits at ANY size' bar: a tall catalog song (Calluses, 30 sheet lines) that the old shrink-to-fit model rendered at ~0.64x (below the 0.8x legibility floor, tiny-but-fitting) must now render at >= 0.8x with every line WRAPPED to the content width and the overflow going to VERTICAL SCROLL, not to a smaller font. Red-first vs the shrink model: the floor assert fails (auto-fit computes ~0.64x for this song at 412x915) and the vertical-scroll assert fails (the whole point of the old model was to shrink until it fit the viewport height).

steps.label: LEGIBILITY FLOOR: --pscale >= 0.8 and every .lyrLine's effective font-size >= 13px - a tall song must NOT be auto-shrunk below readable to fit the viewport (FAILS on the shrink-to-fit model, which lands ~0.64x here)

VERTICAL SCROLL, not shrink: at the readable size this 30-line song is taller than the stage viewport, so pSheet must have real vertical overflow to scroll through (FAILS on the shrink-to-fit model, which shrinks until it fits the height)
no .lyrLine clips horizontally at the readable size (wrapping, not shrinking, is what absorbs the width)
chord stays column-synced over its lyric at the readable size
steps.js: (function(){var pSheet=document.getElementById('pSheet');var lines=pSheet.querySelectorAll('.lyrLine');if(!lines.length)return false;var checked=0;for(var i=0;i<lines.length;i++){var crd=lines[i].querySelector('.crd');if(!crd)continue;var crdNode=crd.firstChild;if(!crdNode||crdNode.nodeType!==3)continue;var lyricNode=null;for(var n=crd.nextSibling;n;n=n.nextSibling){if(n.nodeType===3){lyricNode=n;break;}}if(!lyricNode)continue;var lyricFull=lyricNode.textContent;var lyricStart=lyricFull.indexOf('\n')+1;var crdLen=crdNode.textContent.length;var lyricLen=lyricFull.length-lyricStart;var sampleLen=Math.min(crdLen,lyricLen);if(sampleLen<1)continue;var step=Math.max(1,Math.floor(sampleLen/6));for(var c=0;c<sampleLen;c+=step){var r1=document.createRange();r1.setStart(crdNode,c);r1.setEnd(crdNode,c+1);var r2=document.createRange();r2.setStart(lyricNode,lyricStart+c);r2.setEnd(lyricNode,lyricStart+c+1);var b1=r1.getBoundingClientRect(),b2=r2.getBoundingClientRect();if(Math.abs(b1.left-b2.left)>2)return false;checked++;}}return checked>0;})()
